【无女主+国运+诡异+搞笑+反套路+无限流+直播+规则怪谈】
规则怪谈降临蓝星，每个国家随机选取一人参加。
参选者胜，则国盛；参选者败，则国衰。
经过两轮游戏失败，龙国上下苦不堪言。
新一轮怪谈降临，偏偏选中了刚刚穿越而来、年仅“三岁半”的夏野。
在绝望之中，众人发现，这身高不足一米的小孩子，居然给了他们诺大的惊喜！
诡异们更是惊恐：
“你才三岁半，不可能有这么强大的力量！”
“你到底是谁？！”
开局抽中SSS级天赋、在怪谈世界大杀特杀的夏野却有着自己的烦恼。
他时常看着自己的小短腿，仰天长啸：
“咱就是说，谁家好人只点力量，不点速度的啊喂！”
前期扮猪吃虎，后期神挡杀神。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/89e6303ee2363aaae23bc2fa01d875ad","author":"闲人之一","author_id":"","book_id":"7310867157355596862","book_name":"规则怪谈：夺少？三岁半！","book_short_name":"怪谈：三岁半","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7310867922782536254","read_count":"14036","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1028979"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"508","tags":"
